none.justification: Lists all 10 GT references across both src/utils/eloop.c and src/utils/eloop_win.c with the correct line numbers and no false positives. It also correctly notes there are no string/comment occurrences and no other src/ references; minor path label omission of the src/ prefix in bullets does not affect correctness.

ccodegraph.justification: Exactly matches the GT: 5 references in eloop.c, 5 in eloop_win.c, correct line numbers, kinds, and total of 2 definitions plus 8 calls. It explicitly handles the no-string/comment requirement and gives no false positives.

lsp.justification: Reports the complete 10-reference set with correct files and line numbers, including the Windows backend despite LSP not indexing it. It correctly states both platform-static implementations count under src/ and that there are no string/comment hits.
